name: Profiteroles Au Chocolat
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the butter with hot water in a pan and heat until it reaches a rolling boil.
2. Shut down the heat and gradually add all of the flour, beating well to incorporate.
3. Turn the fire back on and dry out the mixture for 5 minutes.
4. Add eggs one at a time, incorporating each completely before adding the next.
5. Pipe profiteroles onto a cookie sheet and bake in a 375°F (190°C) oven for 50 minutes.
6. Turn off the oven and allow the profiteroles to cool in the pan.
7. Crack the oven door slightly during cooling to prevent moisture buildup.
8. If not using immediately, place the profiteroles in the freezer until ready to serve.
9. Once frozen, store them in a plastic bag to avoid staleness.
10. To serve, cut the profiteroles in half and heat briefly in the oven.
11. Place a small scoop of ice cream in each bottom half.
12. Cover with the remaining top, then drizzle with hot chocolate sauce.
13. Serve immediately.
